summary: The static-file header pruning divergence is rustfmt-only noise: semicolon insertion on early returns and a test arithmetic line wrap.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 257: M	crates/prune/prune/src/segments/static_file/headers.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to existing early returns and error returns.
The remaining test hunk only changes arithmetic wrapping for `last_pruned_block_number`.
No header pruning range, limiter, table pruning, consistency, or test expectation behavior changed.
